channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Immunosuppression with systemic glucocorticoids near immune checkpoint inhibitor start linked to worse survival
item.description: 1. Systemic glucocorticoid immunosuppression near the start of immune checkpoint inhibitor therapy was associated with poorer overall survival outcome...

item.title: Ensitrelvir linked to lower Covid-19 risk in household contacts
item.description: 1. In this randomized trial, household contacts of Covid-19 patients who took ensitrelvir soon after exposure had a reduced incidence of infection...

item.title: Telitacicept may lower proteinuria in high-risk IgA nephropathy
item.description: 1. An interim analysis of a randomized trial found that adults with IgA nephropathy and persistent proteinuria who received telitacicept had reduced p...
